OverviewLab TestsMedicines

Backend contract

Uses the live endpoints from `/api/v1`, including medicine warnings and lab test search.

Quick routes

Safety checkerDisease suggestions

Medicines

Medicine explorer

Search brands and generics, then move into product details, dose templates, disease suggestions, or warning checks.

Medicine module

Warning checker

POST /medicines/check-warnings

Disease suggestions

GET /medicines/diseases/:diseaseId/suggestions

Detail pages

Open brand products or generic dose templates directly from results.

Search below to navigate into detail pages.

Unified medicine search

Search brands and generics together from the current backend API.

Results load automatically as you type. Open a brand for products or a generic for dose guidance.

Search medicines

Start typing a medicine or brand name to load autosuggest-style results.
